jobs.title: Account Executive, E-Commerce
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>Why join us</strong></p><p>Brex is the intelligent finance platform that enables companies to spend smarter and move faster across the world&#39;s e-commerce, marketplaces, and DTC merchants — Brex Card, Brex Cash, Brex Empower spend management, and Brex Travel run on a single ledger.</p><ul><li>Mid-market enterprise SaaS sales experience required</li></ul></div>

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Empower Platform
jobs.content: <p>Build the spend-management platform that thousands of finance teams run on Brex&rsquo;s Empower product — policies, approvals, virtual cards, and the audit-trail engine the controller and the CFO open every Monday morning.</p>
